description: Integrate build-graph into Measure new-track, implement, review, and setup workflows

sprint.goal: Make build-graph a first-class context source in Measure's new-track, implement, and review workflows so structural questions go to the graph before grep, and graph freshness is preserved across edits
sprint.demo_notes: All 5 stories shipped with same-region task folding (1.1+1.2+1.3 commits separately as planned; 2.1+2.2 folded; 3.1+3.2+3.3 folded; 4.1+4.2+4.3+4.4+4.5 folded; 5.1+5.2+5.3 folded). Renumbering performed in new-track.md §2.2 (steps 2-7→3-8) and §2.3 (steps 3-5→4-6); no external cross-references break. Backward-compat dry-run against lessons_learned_20260307 and visual_refresh_20260425 confirmed no regressions: every graph step degrades to a one-line skip note when build-graph is missing, graph.db is stale, or the project is non-TS.
